# Project Documentation

This is a bare markdown docs tree — no SSG framework, just organized
.md files that can be consumed by any static renderer (readme.so,
GitHub's native .md rendering, or a lightweight custom tool).

The structure is intentional: a top-level `docs/` directory with an
index page, and subsidiary pages for different topics. The probe
accepts this shape when the tree has at least three markdown files
plus a recognizable homepage.

## Contents

- Getting started — install + run
- Architecture — how the pieces fit together
- FAQ — common questions with honest answers
